setup_instructions.step_1: Get your credentials from Decodo dashboard: https://dashboard.decodo.com/
setup_instructions.step_2: Navigate to: Residential Proxies > Residential tab

decodo_configuration.rotation_behavior: Port 7000 assigns NEW IP with EVERY request automatically
decodo_configuration.why_multiple_entries: Our system rotates between entries for load balancing + Decodo rotates IPs = best anti-detection
decodo_configuration.session_handling: Each browser restart gets fresh Decodo session
decodo_configuration.location_targeting: Add -cc-NL to username for Netherlands IPs (recommended for Zalando)

test_your_setup.run_multiple_times: for i in {1..5}; do curl -x http://USER:PASS@gate.smartproxy.com:7000 https://api.ipify.org; echo ''; sleep 1; done
test_your_setup.expected_result: Different IP address each time = rotation working correctly
